payload.reason: Micro plan. Self-reviewed: fix separates Codex platform tool-surface (shell+apply_patch, not WebSearch — design §4.1) from super-harness gating (apply_patch via matcher, never Bash — §3.3/codex.py:36). No behavior change; scope=codex.py+test+plan; existing test tokens (apply_patch/WebSearch/hooks) retained; no AGENTS regen (no Codex subsection in repo). TDD red-green in Task 1.

codex APPROVE + 1 NIT (accepted): test guard 'assert surface in sub.lower()' is weak — 'surface the block' pre-exists elsewhere in the subsection, so it does not actually guard the caveat fix (the negative 'simple shell' assertion is the real guard). Tighten to the caveat-specific phrase 'Codex surfaces only shell commands'. Also fix plan RED rationale (line ~44): RED is expected because 'simple shell' is present, not 'no surface'.

findings.note: codex exec --sandbox read-only reviewed the fix and APPROVED, confirming the reworded caveat correctly separates Codex platform tool-surface (shell + apply_patch, not WebSearch) from super-harness gating (apply_patch via matcher ^(apply_patch|Edit|Write)$, never Bash), matcher/commands/capabilities untouched, accurate vs design doc §3.3/§4.1. codex NIT (accepted, fixed in v2): the TDD guard 'assert "surface" in sub.lower()' was weak because "surface the block" pre-exists elsewhere in the subsection; tightened to the caveat-specific 'assert "Codex surfaces only shell commands" in sub'. Plan RED rationale + Step 1 snippet aligned. test_codex.py 15 passed; full suite 1628; doc/decision gates 0.
